title: The Harborwatch Dispute
briefing: A Compact checkpoint at the harbor gate is being shaken down nightly. Three wardens hurt last week. They want it stopped quietly — nothing in the Register.

title: The Missing Ledger
briefing: A Court notary lost a sealed ledger between two counting houses. It never arrived. Someone has it. Find it before the contents become inconvenient for the wrong people.

title: League Escort: The Long Road
briefing: A League engineer is moving prototype schematics from the Foundry Row to the outer workshop. Three attempts already. He needs four people minimum, professionals only.

title: A Debt Already Paid
briefing: Someone is using a dead man's name to collect on old Ring debts. The payments are real — the claims are not. You have a lead. Follow it before the next collection.

title: The Restored Ask a Favor
briefing: They need a document retrieved from a Court archive before it is sealed. No violence — they are specific about this. Get in, find the record, leave. The Restored will handle the rest.
